creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
If PYTHON_DEFAULT_VERSION=python2.6 is set in make.conf xcb-proto still
requires python2.5 to be built.  This is not strictly required since it does
work with python2.6.  This results in two python versions being build
needlessly.

Fix: Apply the given patch.  

Note: If and when python2.7 is released then the port will need to updated.  I
did this to avoid python3.0 which probably (but not tested) will not work.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/xcb-proto && make all-depends-list PYTHON_DEFAULT_VERSION=python2.6
Note the lang/python25 in the list.
